calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-15-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Anna Michnicka for Petitioner.

The Court stated that the issue is whether notice should have been given to potential Heirs and potential Beneficiaries. Ms. Michnicka stated that this is a "Sweetheart Trust", that all of the assets go to the Surviving Spouse, that there is a pour over will, that it was her understanding that notice wasn't required and spoke of the right to revoke. The Court stated that right to revoke is not relevant at this time. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
